'''Krynda Draay's sister''' was the half-sister of [[Krynda Draay]]. She died in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], apparently in [[3997 BBY]]. Her death, as well as that of her [[Barrison Draay|husband]] and [[Vodo-Siosk Baas|Jedi Master]], hit Krynda very hard. It took four years for her to resume training [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]].
